title: agropyron stenachyrum
intro: Agropyron stenachyrum, also known as Elymus stenachyrum or wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron stenachyrum include improving digestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
